init.h(3) Library Functions Manual init.h(3)

NAME

init.h - Platform initialization and static synchronization helpers.

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct static_mutex_t
Static mutex structure for global mutexes requiring static initialization. struct static_rwlock_t
Static reader-writer lock structure for global rwlocks requiring static initialization. struct static_cond_t
Static condition variable structure for global condition variables requiring static initialization.

Macros


#define STATIC_MUTEX_INIT {.mutex.impl = PTHREAD_MUTEX_INITIALIZER, .mutex.name = NULL, .initialized = 1}
#define STATIC_RWLOCK_INIT {.lock.impl = PTHREAD_RWLOCK_INITIALIZER, .lock.name = NULL, .initialized = 1}
#define STATIC_COND_INIT {.cond.impl = PTHREAD_COND_INITIALIZER, .cond.name = NULL, .initialized = 1}

Functions


asciichat_error_t platform_init (void)
Initialize platform-specific subsystems. void platform_destroy (void)
Cleanup platform-specific subsystems.

Detailed Description

Platform initialization and static synchronization helpers.

Definition in file include/ascii-chat/platform/init.h.

Author

Zachary Fogg <me@zfo.gg>

Version 0.9.8 ascii-chat
